name: Label Encoder
description: Encodes categorical columns (text values like 'male'/'female' or 'yes'/'no') into numeric labels (0, 1, 2...). ML models require numbers, not text. Adds new '_encoded' columns alongside the originals.
inputDescription: Dataset with categorical columns to encode

name.label: Name
name.description: Unique identifier for this node in the pipeline

columns.label: Columns to Encode
columns.description: Comma-separated column names containing text/categorical values to convert to numbers.

keep_original.label: Keep Original Columns
keep_original.description: If enabled, original text columns are kept alongside new '_encoded' columns. If disabled, originals are replaced.

outputDescription: Dataset with categorical columns encoded as integers
